title: VIRISMP
description: This is the official VIRISMP modpack, shaped around for fun, creativity, exploration, adventures and made for having a good time with the community.
body:
# VIRISMP - S2
_**It has come to an end (May 27th, 2026)**_

The world is available to download with this link - [ViriSMP S2 World](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1rIxbPGMoyu63xyDYzEae-SRZp4eCEtuR/view?usp=sharing)

![VIRI SMP S2 Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/339c626f5a8d177f54067e020b5184c9a198dee4_0.webp)

This modpack brings a lot more fun to VIRISMP Season 2 while keeping that nice vanilla vibe. Just better and lightweight with a bunch of furniture, new building blocks, more cooking stuff, vanilla-style dungeons/structures, treasures and plenty more to mess around with.


### ✨ Fun Stuff

- [PatPat](https://modrinth.com/mod/patpat) – pat your friends (hold left ctrl + right click). or… turn it into a bonk with a texture pack if you’re feeling evil 😈 (check the mod page for that)
- [Plushies](https://modrinth.com/mod/plushables)
- [Kiss a Friend](https://modrinth.com/mod/kiss-a-friend)
- [Just Sit](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-sit!)
- [Animated player emotes](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft)
- [Fancy beds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-beds)
- [Little Joys](https://modrinth.com/mod/little-joys)
- [Mine Treasures](https://modrinth.com/mod/mine-treasure)
- [7TV emotes](https://modrinth.com/mod/streamotes) (linked to [iiTzViridian Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/iitzviridian) channel)
- [Emojis](https://modrinth.com/mod/emojis)
- [Ride together](https://modrinth.com/mod/ride-together)
- [Ridable dolphins](https://modrinth.com/mod/rideable-dolphins)
- [Coffee variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/coffee-variants)
- [Camera / photography](https://modrinth.com/mod/camerapture)
- [Essential cosmetics](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)
- [More villager sounds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vvi)
- [More music discs](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-music-discs)

### ☘️ Exploration (on the server)
- [Cherry Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherryvillage)
- [Dungeons and Tavern series](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns)
- [Katters Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/katters-structures)
- [Moog's Structures series](https://modrinth.com/mod/mbs-moogs-bountiful-structures)


### ⚙️ Quality of Life (QoL)

- [Higher render distance than server](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- [Journeymap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap)
- [Tom’s Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage)
- [Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-backpacks)
- [Crafting on a Stick](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-on-a-stick)
- [Entangled Crystals](https://modrinth.com/mod/entangled-crystals)
- [Key lock](https://modrinth.com/mod/key)
- [Ping Wheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel) (press Mouse5 to ping locations)
- [Status](https://modrinth.com/mod/status) (AFK, live, etc.)
- [Scribble](https://modrinth.com/mod/scribble) (better book & quill formatting)
- [Nature Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass)
- [Not Interest](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-interested)
- [Doubledoors](https://modrinth.com/mod/double-doors)
- [Nutritious Milk](https://modrinth.com/mod/nutritious-milk)
- [Chat history](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)
- [Longer chat history](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-clear)
- [Bridging mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bridging-mod)
- [Gamma utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils)
- [Gravestones](https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumono_gravestones)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Dynamic lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
- [Tooltip scroll](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltip-scroll)



We’re using [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) for voice, with [Enhanced Groups](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-groups).

There are also a bunch of client-side performance mods to keep things running smooth, plus some visual upgrades (textures + shaders) to make the game look really nice without killing performance or vanilla feel.

_**We’re always open to suggestions!**_
_Feel free to join the Discord linked with this modpack and share your ideas or feedback 🙌_


❤️ Huge thanks to
- iiTzViridian
- Awesomeguy
- Ashley
- LogiBogi
- Niyonnana
- Lexi
- Testiee (Mental Support / Test Subject - We love him)
- and everyone else in Viri's community who suggest stuff and helped to balance everything for the SMP.
